action: Bind canonical queue state, append-only projections, and referenced evidence to one immutable repository commit and deterministic source digest without mutating ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
observed: A full source commit is resolved before queue, projection, or evidence bytes are read.
Source inputs are read from Git objects at the resolved commit rather than from a mutable working tree.
A deterministic digest binds the source commit and exact source inventory.
Materialization remains denied because snapshot consistency is not authorization.
inferred: This removes mixed-time repository reads from the continuity materialization review path.
proposed: Reconcile directly from the snapshot-bound blob contents and define a separate signed or policy-bound materialization authority.
superseded: Assuming sequential working-tree reads represent one immutable repository state.
unresolved: The reconciler is not yet fed directly from snapshot-bound blob contents.
next_action: Add a snapshot-native reconciliation adapter that parses the bound canonical queue and projections from the selected commit, invokes queue reconciliation without working-tree reads, and hashes the resulting candidate separately from its source inventory.
